text: Upon the transfer of registration of a vehicle reported as stolen or embezzled, the department shall immediately notify the reporting agency of such fact.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 1. Reports of Stolen Vehicles [10500 - 10505]
##### § 10505

Upon the transfer of registration of a vehicle reported as stolen or embezzled, the department shall immediately notify the reporting agency of such fact.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Upon the transfer of registration of a vehicle reported as stolen or embezzled, the department shall immediately notify the reporting agency of such fact.
